description_long: This object is a rectangular jewelry display counter with a glass enclosure on the top and sides, allowing clear visibility of the items inside. The display area is divided into multiple sections with red borders, each containing neatly arranged jewelry pieces or trays. The base of the counter is solid, featuring a two-tone color scheme with a dark brown band above a light gray lower section. The glass panels are framed with thin, dark metal, providing both structural support and a modern aesthetic. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for showcasing valuable items in a retail jewelry store environment.
description: A rectangular glass jewelry display counter with red-bordered sections and a solid two-tone base, designed for showcasing jewelry in a retail setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the glass display area with red-bordered sections and the solid two-tone base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the counter, the glass enclosure, and the arrangement of display sections inside.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the glass enclosure and sectioned display area from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the depth and internal arrangement of the display sections.
